label: Dissolved oxygen (diel swings)
primary_citation: Staehr et al. 2010 Limnol. Oceanogr. Methods doi:10.4319/lom.2010.8.628
supporting_citation: Dugan et al. 2016 Inland Waters doi:10.5268/IW-6.4.883; Jane et al. 2021 Nature doi:10.1038/s41586-021-03550-y
notes: Eutrophic lakes swing 5-15 mg/L over 6-12 h; requires <=10-min sampling to resolve metabolism

label: Nutrient pulses (storm N/P)
primary_citation: Bieroza et al. 2018 Sci Total Environ doi:10.1016/j.scitotenv.2017.11.179
supporting_citation: Jarvie et al. 2018 Hydrol. Process. doi:10.1002/hyp.13251; Rode et al. 2016 ES&T doi:10.1021/acs.est.6b02155
notes: Storm-driven nutrient flush on hours; grab sampling misses 60-90% of load

label: Streamflow events
supporting_citation: McMillan 2020 WIREs Water doi:10.1002/wat2.1450; Blaen et al. 2016 STE doi:10.1016/j.scitotenv.2016.06.116
notes: Small catchments hours; large basins 1-3 days

label: DOM molecular composition
primary_citation: Kellerman et al. 2015 Nat. Commun. doi:10.1038/ncomms8273
supporting_citation: Spencer et al. 2015 GRL doi:10.1002/2015GL063498; Howard et al. 2024 L&O Letters doi:10.1002/lol2.10351
notes: Photochemical turnover hours; bulk DOM weeks-months

label: Phytoplankton blooms
primary_citation: Huisman et al. 2018 Nat. Rev. Microbiol. doi:10.1038/s41579-018-0040-1
supporting_citation: Ho Michalak Pahlevan 2019 Nature doi:10.1038/s41586-019-1648-7; Carey et al. 2022 GCB doi:10.1111/gcb.16256
notes: Onset days; persistence weeks; chl-a forecast horizons 1-14 d

label: Macroinvertebrate turnover
primary_citation: Bonada et al. 2006 Annu. Rev. Entomol. doi:10.1146/annurev.ento.51.110104.151124
notes: Seasonal community signals; decadal trait turnover

label: Fish recruitment
primary_citation: Houde 2008 J. Northwest Atl. Fish. Sci. doi:10.2960/J.v41.m634
supporting_citation: Myers 2001 ICES J. Mar. Sci. doi:10.1006/jmsc.2001.1109
notes: Year-class strength set in first year; cohort effects multi-year

label: NEON aquatic sensors
primary_citation: Thomas et al. 2023 Frontiers Ecol Environ doi:10.1002/fee.2616
supporting_citation: NEON.DOC.001152 water-quality data product specification; Olsson et al. 2025 Ecol Apps doi:10.1002/eap.70004
notes: 5-min raw measurements; 15-min data products; 4-h vertical profiles at deeper lake sites (TOOK; PRPO)

label: GLEON sensor buoys
primary_citation: Hamilton et al. 2015 Inland Waters doi:10.5268/iw-5.1.566
supporting_citation: Meinson et al. 2016 Aquat. Ecol. doi:10.1007/s10452-015-9561-0; Hipsey et al. 2019 GMD doi:10.5194/gmd-12-473-2019
notes: Sensor cadence typically 1-15 min on GLEON buoys; varies per lake

label: High-frequency research lakes
supporting_citation: Read et al. 2019 L&O Letters doi:10.1002/lol2.10114
notes: Forecast-grade lake stations at sub-hourly sensor cadence

label: GRDC streamflow
primary_citation: GRDC 2020 River Discharge Data User Manual, BfG
notes: Daily dominates; hourly subset for real-time gauges

label: Structured citizen science
primary_citation: Thornhill et al. 2019 Freshwater Sci. doi:10.1086/701665
notes: Riverfly and FreshWater Watch typically monthly

label: WFD compliance monitoring
primary_citation: EC 2003 WFD CIS Guidance Document No. 7: Monitoring
supporting_citation: EEA 2018 European waters EEA Report 7/2018; Poikane et al. 2020 STE doi:10.1016/j.scitotenv.2020.140075

label: GEMS/Water
supporting_citation: GRQA Virta et al. 2023 ESSD doi:10.5194/essd-15-5551-2023
notes: Target monthly; realised quarterly-annual; severe under-reporting outside OECD

label: GBIF opportunistic
notes: Irregular; effective annual cadence with strong taxonomic and temporal bias

label: US NARS 5-yr cycle
primary_citation: USEPA 2020 National Aquatic Resource Surveys Design
supporting_citation: Paulsen et al. 2008 J. N. Am. Benthol. Soc. doi:10.1899/08-098.1
